text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=9926898a0c052d79aaa08708e3249fc39e633174

commit 9926898a0c052d79aaa08708e3249fc39e633174
Author:     Cy Schubert <cy@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2024-02-13 00:33:16 +0000
Commit:     Cy Schubert <cy@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-02-13 18:47:53 +0000

    security/krb5*: Flavorize with default and ldap flavors

    This provides a binary package to users who require MIT KRB5 with LDAP
    support. This patch does not change the current, now default, package
    name.

    PR:             277015

 5 files changed, 39 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)
